MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff and Defendant. No appearance by Cross-Complainant Ilpyong Kim & Cross-Complainant Chong G. Park, Cross- Complainants in Propria Persona are sanctioned $350.00, each for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/28/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Dept. #212. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee, CSR#2647.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft Chong G. Park To Respond To Discovery
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs Korean Center's Motion To Compel Defendant Chong G. Park To Respond To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Chong G. Park's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant Chong G. Park is ordered to respond to the form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for admissions are deemed admitted. Monetary sanctions are awarded against Defendant Chong G. Park in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft Ilpyong Kim To Respond To Discovery
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs Korean Center's Motion To Compel Defendant Ilpyoung Kim To Respond To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Ilpyoung Kim's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant Ilpyoung Kim is ordered to respond to the form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for admissions are deemed admitted. Monetary sanctions are awarded against Defendant Ilpyoung Kim in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
